description_long: This is a sleek, modern coupe car with a streamlined black exterior and a low, sporty stance. The body features smooth, flowing lines, a gently sloping roofline, and a compact rear, characteristic of a fastback coupe. The front end is equipped with angular headlights, a prominent grille, and subtle chrome accents, while the rear showcases wraparound taillights and a subtle integrated trunk lip. The car sits on multi-spoke alloy wheels, and the windows are tinted, adding to its sophisticated appearance. The door handles are flush with the body, and side mirrors are compact and aerodynamic. The overall design suggests a focus on both style and performance, suitable for urban and suburban environments.
description: A sleek black coupe car with a streamlined fastback profile, angular headlights, and wraparound taillights. It features alloy wheels, tinted windows, and a sporty, modern design.
description_view_0: Front three-quarter view showing the angular headlights, prominent grille, and alloy wheels.
description_view_1: Rear three-quarter view highlighting the wraparound taillights, sloping roofline, and trunk lip.
description_view_2: Rear side view emphasizing the taillights, rear bumper, and the smooth transition of the roofline.
description_view_3: Front side view focusing on the headlights, grille, and the sleek side profile.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
